Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Laurent Ruessmann For Judgment Or Partial Judgment On The Pleadings Against Plaintiffs
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LAURENT RUESSMANN's Motion For Judgment Or Partial Judgment On The Pleadings Against Plaintiffs is DENIED. At the pleading stage the "intention of the parties" cannot be properly addressed. Keene v. Harling (1964) 61 Cal.2d 318. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
